theme: 一盘拆信刀和黄铜回形针，为什么越来越多人想把办公桌过成一本旧小说

items.source: 01_胡桃木托盘里的拆信刀和黄铜回形针.png
items.title: 胡桃木托盘里的拆信刀和黄铜回形针
items.description: 胡桃木托盘里那把拆信刀和一小堆黄铜回形针，足够让办公桌突然像有了小说气味。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, letter opener and brass paper clips arranged in a walnut tray on a desk, warm reading lamp glow, literary tactile still life, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 02_未拆开的厚信封和细长拆信刀.png
items.title: 未拆开的厚信封和细长拆信刀
items.description: 没有真的拆开信，反而更容易让人把整个桌面想象成一段旧时代剧情。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, unopened thick envelope beside a slender letter opener on a writing desk, moody vintage-modern atmosphere, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 黄铜回形针散在旧书边缘
items.description: 黄铜回形针散在旧书边上时，办公室就不再只是处理任务的地方，而像一个缓慢展开的段落。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, brass paper clips scattered near the edge of an old book on a desk, textured paper and warm wood surfaces, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 04_阅读灯下压着蜡封印章的便笺.png
items.title: 阅读灯下压着蜡封印章的便笺
items.description: 一张被压住的便笺和蜡封印章，会让很多人瞬间想把现代办公桌过得更像旧小说。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, note paper under a reading lamp with wax seal stamp nearby, warm focused light, literary desk styling, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 05_抽屉里分格收纳的黄铜小物.png
items.title: 抽屉里分格收纳的黄铜小物
items.description: 黄铜小物被分格收纳好时，克制和讲究都会一起变得可见。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, desk drawer compartments filled with brass clips and small stationery objects, organized and tactile, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 手指沿着拆信刀边缘停顿
items.description: 停在刀柄上的手指，会让这组小物从静物变成真正有人设的桌面。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, fingers pausing along the handle of a letter opener on a desk, intimate human gesture, cinematic close-up, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 07_胡桃木桌面上的纸张边缘和回形针.png
items.title: 胡桃木桌面上的纸张边缘和回形针
items.description: 纸张边缘和回形针的关系处理得足够好，整个桌面就会像一本旧小说的插图。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, sheet edges and brass paper clips on a walnut desk, balanced composition with vintage-inspired office mood, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 08_午后窗光里的黄铜夹子反光.png
items.title: 午后窗光里的黄铜夹子反光
items.description: 黄铜在午后反光的那一下，会让极普通的办公桌变得非常值得保存转发。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, afternoon window light glinting off brass clips on a quiet desk, elegant reflections and soft shadows, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 09_钢笔旁边安静放着的拆信刀.png
items.title: 钢笔旁边安静放着的拆信刀
items.description: 拆信刀和钢笔放在一起时，工作的节奏会突然像被调慢了半拍。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, letter opener resting beside a fountain pen on a desk, restrained literary office still life, warm neutral tones, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 10_夜里收桌前叠好的信纸和夹子.png
items.title: 夜里收桌前叠好的信纸和夹子
items.description: 夜里收桌前把信纸和夹子叠好，是很多人把日常过成小说的重要小动作。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, neatly stacked stationery and brass clips before tidying a desk at night, intimate warm lamp lighting, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 11_旧便笺本压着一枚蜡封和回形针.png
items.title: 旧便笺本压着一枚蜡封和回形针
items.description: 这些稍微过时的细节叠在一起，才会让现代办公桌看起来像有人在认真经营一种气质。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, old memo pad weighted by a wax seal and brass paper clip, layered textures on a writing desk, no logos, no readable text.

items.source: 12_关灯前托盘里只剩一把拆信刀.png
items.title: 关灯前托盘里只剩一把拆信刀
items.description: 灯快关掉时托盘里只剩那把拆信刀，会让整组图像有一个非常旧小说式的收尾。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, just one letter opener left in a tray before the desk lamp is turned off, quiet end-of-day literary mood, warm shadows, no logos, no readable text.
